news.t: Columbia Research Enhanced Core ETF (RECS) Celebrates Five-Year Anniversary, $1B AUM Milestone
Columbia Research Enhanced Core ETF (RECS) and Columbia Research Enhanced Value ETF (REVS) Celebrate Three-Year Milestone

holdings.infoBox: RECS is an equity ETF with a total of 373 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 9.16%, Apple at 8.96%, Microsoft at 4.93%, Alphabet at 3.19%, and The Procter & Gamble Company at 2.23%.

overview.description: The Columbia Research Enhanced Core ETF (RECS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of US stocks pulled from the Russell 1000. The index uses multifactor selection and market cap weighting. RECS was launched on Sep 25, 2019 and is issued by Columbia Threadneedle.
infoTable: Beta Advantage Research Enhanced US Equity Index
